problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression
hypothesis: The key to What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue? is mRNA therapy to upregulate/downregulate gene expression — specifically mRNA therapy to — which would help 1,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Retrospective cohort analysis with 27 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
